street.description: Street the space is on — the designation header before the colon/comma, as written (including parenthetical village qualifiers like 'North Street (Newtonville)' and carriageway designations like 'Commonwealth Avenue, South Drive')

side.description: Side of street the space is on; inline enum extends common#side with intercardinal values ('southeast side', 'northeast side' appear in this section) — see spec's Proposed common vocabulary

cross_street.description: Reference street or way from which offsets are measured, or the cross street of a corner entry; only named streets/ways, as written; empty for frontage and landmark-only entries

offset_feet.description: Distance in feet from cross_street to the (start) point of the space ('220 feet from Centre Street', 'from a point 290’ east of Oak Street'); feet symbol ’ normalizes to the bare integer

offset_direction.description: Compass bearing from cross_street to the measured point(s) ('185 feet north of Watertown Street' → north); empty when the source gives none ('220 feet from Centre Street'); inline compass-point enum — see spec's Proposed common vocabulary

to_offset_feet.description: End-point offset in feet for two-point segments ('from a point 185 feet north of Watertown Street to a point 390 feet north of Watertown Street'); shares cross_street and offset_direction with offset_feet; empty for single-point entries

length_feet.description: Stated linear extent of the space(s) in feet ('westerly 20 feet', '20 feet easterly', '20’ easterly'); empty for two-point segments, point-only entries, and 'to end' extents

extent_direction.description: Compass bearing the space extends from the start point ('westerly' → west, 'northerly to end' → north); same inline compass-point enum as offset_direction

spaces.description: Number of designated spaces when the source states one ('(6 spaces)' → 6, 'Two spaces' → 2, 'Three (3) accessible parking spaces' → 3, 'one accessible space' → 1); empty when unstated (a single space is implied but never recorded)

address_number.description: House number(s) the space fronts, digits as written without the '#' ('16', '18-20', '38 or 42'); only when the address is on the same street as `street` — numbers on other streets stay in location_detail

location_detail.description: Positional qualifiers that are not offsets: carriageway ('eastern roadway', 'south Drive'), landmark phrases ('opposite Auburndale Brach library', 'just to the west of the ramp'), corner designations ('NW corner'), open-ended extents ('to end'); multiple distinct qualifiers joined with '; ' in source order

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text (typos, stray characters, ambiguity flags); never carries data
